Card.usage: Wraps summary data, metrics, or sections on dashboard pages

MetricCard.usage: Displays a single KPI — score, transaction count, revenue

DataTable.usage: Displays transaction records, businesses list, disputes

Sidebar.usage: Main portal navigation — persistent left sidebar

TopNav.usage: Top header in all portal environments

StatusBadge.usage: Shows status of profile, consent, disputes, financing

ScoreRing.usage: Circular score display on Financial Identity and Dashboard

Modal.usage: Consent grant flow, confirm actions, dispute form

Toast.usage: Operation feedback — bank linked, consent granted, error

EmptyState.usage: No transactions yet, no consent records, no linked accounts

Tabs.usage: Financial Identity page sections, settings sections
